name: The A2 Milk Company Limited
analysis: A2M has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$7.1900, stop A$5.3015, target A$8.5572 (0.72:1) — then trail it.
